channel.title: Zeithamova, D. on DANIELLE COSME
channel.description: Recent content in Zeithamova, D. on DANIELLE COSME

item.title: Choosing to regulate: Does choice enhance craving regulation?
item.description:
Citation:
Cosme, D., Mobasser, A., Zeithamova, D., Berkman E. T., & Pfeifer, J. H. (2018) Choosing to regulate: Does choice enhance craving regulation?. Social Cognitive and Affective Neuroscience, 13(3), 300-309.
